prompts.text: Before playing, introduce 1–2 unusual words from the story. Say: "In this story we'll hear the word '[word]' — it means [meaning]."
Before pressing play, ask: "What do you think this story might be about? What clues can you see?"
Pause after a key moment and ask: "What do you think will happen next?"
After the story, say: "Tell me what happened in your own words — start with 'First...'"
